description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a classic, robust design reminiscent of the Colt M1911. The frame and slide are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, showing subtle wear and a utilitarian appearance. The grip panels are made of a dark brown material, likely wood or textured polymer, featuring a fine checkered pattern for enhanced handling. The trigger guard is rounded and smoothly integrated into the frame, while the barrel is of standard length and lacks external threading or compensators. Minimalistic in its external features, the handgun has no visible slide serrations or prominent markings, giving it a clean, functional look. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A dark, matte-finished semi-automatic handgun with checkered brown grips and a classic, streamlined profile. The design is minimalistic, with a rounded trigger guard and a flush magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the checkered brown grip, rounded trigger guard, and smooth slide.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the slide, the alignment of the sights, and the narrow profile of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other grip panel, slide, and frame details, mirroring the first side with minimal external markings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle opening, barrel crown, and the rounded trigger guard beneath.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a rectangular, slightly contoured shape with beveled edges for comfort. Its surface is covered in a fine checkered pattern, providing a secure, non-slip hold. The material appears to be dark brown wood or polymer, with a subtle matte finish and no visible logos or embellishments. The grip panels are secured with screws and lack finger grooves or additional ergonomic shaping, emphasizing a traditional, utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and of moderate thickness, smoothly integrated into the frame without any undercuts or squared-off edges. It has a plain, functional appearance with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and does not feature accessory rails or integrated design elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and a matte finish matching the rest of the handgun. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the muzzle is cleanly cut with a simple crown. No external markings or embellishments are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unmarked, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, or visible logos or texturing on the floorplate.
